title: D.O.T.S. Discovery System
description: Phase 6: Build the dots command — the self-documenting discovery system. Write shell/dots.zsh that parses '# Commands:' headers from all module files. Support: dots (overview), dots <group> (detail), dots --all (everything), dots --search <term> (search). Add # Commands: headers to all modules.

title: Write shell/dots.zsh
description: Implement the dots() function (~50-80 lines of zsh). Globs modules/*.zsh and machines/DOTFILES_MACHINE/modules/*.zsh, parses '# Commands:' header blocks. Supports: 'dots' (overview with group names and command counts), 'dots <group>' (detail for one group with source file), 'dots --all' (every command across all groups), 'dots --search <term>' (grep across all command descriptions). Prints 'D.O.T.S. — Don't Overthink Shit' banner on overview.

title: Add # Commands: headers to all universal modules
description: Ensure every file in modules/ has the standard header format: first line is file path comment, second line is group description, then blank line, then '# Commands:' block listing each command with its arguments and one-line description. Covers: git.zsh, docker.zsh, navigation.zsh, crypto.zsh, web.zsh, advent.zsh, aliases.zsh.

title: Add # Commands: headers to all machine modules
description: Ensure every file in machines/personal/modules/ and machines/ibotta/modules/ has the standard # Commands: header format. Covers: woog.zsh, services.zsh, deploy.zsh, kubernetes.zsh, aws.zsh, oncall.zsh.

title: Test dots discovery system
description: Verify all dots modes work correctly: 'dots' shows overview with correct group counts, 'dots git' shows git group detail with source file, 'dots --all' lists every command, 'dots --search deploy' finds deployment commands across groups. Test on both machine profiles if possible.

title: Snapshot and Scaffold
description: Phase 1: Tag the pre-revitalization state and create the new directory structure (shell/, modules/, machines/, archive/, tools/, bin/). Set up .gitignore for bin/ and create archive/README.md.

title: Tag pre-revitalization state
description: Create git tag 'pre-revitalization' on the current state so nothing is truly lost. This is the safety net before restructuring.

title: Create new directory structure
description: Create skeleton directories: shell/, modules/, machines/personal/, machines/personal/modules/, machines/ibotta/, machines/ibotta/modules/, machines/unknown/, archive/, archive/modules/, archive/machines/, tools/, tools/startup-message/, bin/

title: Set up .gitignore for bin/
description: Add bin/ to .gitignore so compiled Go binaries aren't tracked. Source in tools/ is tracked, output in bin/ is not.

title: Create archive/README.md
description: Write a brief README for the archive directory: retired code lives here, nothing is sourced, preserved for history and nostalgia. Inspired by the Obsidian vault philosophy.

title: Foundation
description: Phase 2: Write shell/init.zsh (machine detection, oh-my-zsh, p10k), shell/path.zsh (consolidated PATH), and the new zshrc with module auto-loader. Verify the sourcing chain boots cleanly.

title: Write shell/init.zsh
description: Machine detection, oh-my-zsh setup, p10k instant prompt. Centralize hostname detection into single DOTFILES_MACHINE export: 'six' -> personal, MAC-pattern -> ibotta, * -> unknown. Source linker_aliases if exists. This replaces detection logic currently in zshrc, .zsh_config, and get_startup_message.py.

title: Write shell/path.zsh
description: Consolidate all universal PATH modifications into one file. Currently PATH entries are scattered across 6+ files. This file handles: homebrew prefix, coreutils from brew. Machine-specific PATH goes in machines/<machine>/path.zsh instead.

title: Write new zshrc with module auto-loader
description: Replace current 41-line zshrc with the new ~20-line version. Sets DOTFILES, sources shell/init.zsh and shell/path.zsh, auto-loads all modules/*.zsh files, then conditionally loads machines/DOTFILES_MACHINE/ (init.zsh, path.zsh, aliases.zsh, modules/*.zsh). Loads shell/dots.zsh last.

title: Verify sourcing chain boots cleanly
description: Test that the new zshrc sources everything without errors. Can test with 'zsh -i' or opening a new terminal. At this point modules/ and machines/ dirs may be empty so nothing breaks — we just need the loader itself to work.

title: Cleanup and Documentation
description: Phase 8: Delete remaining dead files (toolbox_config, LLM instruction files, common/ directory). Update backup_dotfiles.sh for new paths. Update CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect the new structure.

title: Delete LLM instruction files
description: Delete common/alternate.md, common/llm_instructions.md, common/parker_claude_code_mode.md. These are being replaced by a future centralized CLAUDE.md snippet approach. No archive value.

title: Delete common/ directory
description: After .common_config extracted to modules/, .toolbox_config functionality moved to shell/init.zsh, and LLM files deleted, the common/ directory should be empty. Delete it entirely.

title: Delete old top-level .zsh_config
description: The .zsh_config file's content has been absorbed into shell/init.zsh. Delete the old file and verify no references remain.

title: Update backup_dotfiles.sh for new paths
description: The backup script copies files from system locations into the repo. Update all paths to reflect new structure: personal/ -> machines/personal/, work/ -> machines/ibotta/. Update hostname checks to use the same patterns. Verify Brewfile, gitconfig, p10k.zsh copies target correct new locations.

title: Update CLAUDE.md
description: Rewrite CLAUDE.md to reflect the new repository structure: shell/, modules/, machines/, archive/, tools/. Document the module convention (# Commands: headers), the dots discovery system, the archive pattern, and the machine directory naming convention.

title: Update README.md
description: Rewrite README.md to reflect the new structure. Cover: D.O.T.S. philosophy, directory layout, how to add/deprecate/archive commands, the dots command, machine setup, cron backup, and the Go startup message build step.

title: Write machines/unknown/init.zsh
description: Minimal fallback init for unrecognized machines. Should print a notice that the machine isn't configured and suggest adding a case to shell/init.zsh. No PATH modifications, no aliases — just enough to not break.

title: Decompose Common Config
description: Phase 3: Extract common/.common_config into topical module files under modules/ (git.zsh, docker.zsh, navigation.zsh, crypto.zsh, web.zsh, advent.zsh, aliases.zsh). Archive git-upstream(). Delete the old common_config.

title: Extract modules/git.zsh
description: Extract from common/.common_config: git-purge-dir(), git-purge-file(), git-amend(). Exclude git-upstream() (obsolete, goes to archive). Add # Commands: header block for dots discovery.

title: Extract modules/docker.zsh
description: Extract from common/.common_config: murderdocker() function, containers alias. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract modules/navigation.zsh
description: Extract from common/.common_config: o() opens in Finder, a() opens in VSCode, mkd() mkdir+cd, repos alias, dotfiles alias. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract modules/crypto.zsh
description: Extract from common/.common_config: crypto, eth, btc aliases (rate.sx based). Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract modules/web.zsh
description: Extract from common/.common_config: weather() function (wttr.in, Denver default), status-dog() function (httpstatusdogs.com). Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract modules/advent.zsh
description: Extract from common/.common_config: aoc() and advent-of-code() Advent of Code template generator. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract modules/aliases.zsh
description: Extract remaining universal aliases from common/.common_config: cat=bat, lsa, lsal, python=python3, reload, week(), message(). Add # Commands: header block.

title: Archive git-upstream()
description: Move git-upstream() to archive/modules/git.zsh with date comment. The function itself notes that push.autoSetupRemote makes it obsolete. First resident of the archive.

title: Delete common/.common_config
description: After all content has been extracted to modules/ or archived, delete common/.common_config. Verify no remaining references to it in the sourcing chain.

title: Validation
description: Phase 9: End-to-end validation. Source full chain from scratch on both machine profiles. Verify dots --all shows all commands. Test startup message binary. Verify cron backup works with new paths. Final audit that every old file is migrated, archived, or intentionally deleted.

title: Full sourcing chain smoke test
description: Source the full zshrc from scratch. Verify no errors, no missing file warnings, no undefined variable issues. Test with both DOTFILES_MACHINE=personal and DOTFILES_MACHINE=ibotta profiles. Can use 'DOTFILES_MACHINE=personal zsh -i' to simulate.

title: Verify dots --all shows all commands
description: Run 'dots --all' and verify every command from every module is listed. Cross-reference against the VISION.md module breakdown tables. No command should be missing from the discovery system.

title: Verify dots --search works
description: Test dots --search with several terms: 'purge', 'deploy', 'docker', 'weather'. Each should return relevant results with correct group tags. Verify no false negatives.

title: Verify startup message binary performance
description: Time the Go startup-message binary vs the old Python script. Expect <5ms for Go vs ~30-50ms for Python. Run: 'time bin/startup-message machines/personal/messages.txt' multiple times to confirm.

title: Verify cron backup works with new paths
description: Run backup_dotfiles.sh manually and verify it correctly copies files from system locations to the new directory structure. Check that all expected files land in machines/personal/ or machines/ibotta/ as appropriate.

title: Final migration audit
description: Review every file that existed pre-revitalization. Verify each is either: migrated to new location, archived in archive/, or intentionally deleted. No orphaned files should remain. Check with: git diff --stat pre-revitalization..HEAD.

title: Decompose Ibotta Config
description: Phase 5: Break work/.work_config (322 lines) into machines/ibotta/ structure (init.zsh, path.zsh, aliases.zsh, modules/services.zsh, deploy.zsh, kubernetes.zsh, aws.zsh, oncall.zsh). Move Brewfile, gitconfig, p10k.zsh, scripts. Archive deprecated_stuff.sh. Delete old work/ directory.

title: Build machines/ibotta/init.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: IBOTTA ASCII logo, startup message invocation, environment variables (AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, SESSION_TTL, FEDERATION_TOKEN_TTL, ASSUME_ROLE_TTL, GRANTED_ALIAS_CONFIGURED, DOCKER_HOST), keychain credential loading (GEM_REPO_LOGIN, NPM_REPO_LOGIN, MVN_REPO_LOGIN, GEMINI_API_KEY), REPO_BASE_PATH.

title: Archive deprecated_stuff.sh
description: Move work/deprecated_stuff.sh to archive/machines/ibotta/deprecated_stuff.sh. Add date comment at top: '# Archived: 2026-02-17 — Never sourced, contains deprecated Argo/protobuf functions'. First archive resident alongside git-upstream().

title: Delete old work/ directory
description: After all content migrated or archived, delete the old work/ directory. Verify no remaining references in the sourcing chain.

title: Build machines/ibotta/path.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: NVM_DIR and nvm setup, rbenv init, toolbox scripts PATH, npm bin PATH additions. Consolidate all Ibotta-specific PATH modifications.

title: Build machines/ibotta/aliases.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: format-clip, qc() (git add-commit-push), schedule(), repos override, tools alias, check_receipt, keychain helpers (peek-zshenv-var, rm-zshenv-var, zshenv-var), SSH aliases (ssh-receipts, ssh-tools, ssh-cole), npx clean, cosy. General Ibotta aliases that don't fit into a specific module.

title: Extract machines/ibotta/modules/services.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: all microservice navigation aliases (bvs, wtc, ros, som, trs, rdc, prs, acs, earnings, drake, monolith, rspec, catalog, tk, hub, portal, cha, scripts, nx). Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract machines/ibotta/modules/deploy.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: build_and_promote(), promote(), deploy_production(), mono-deploy-stage(), deploy_mono_stage(), reset_mono_stage(), thanks_for_your_contribution_detekt(). Deployment workflow functions. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract machines/ibotta/modules/kubernetes.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: kubeconfig-prod(), kubeconfig-stage(), kubeconfig-local() functions for switching Kubernetes cluster contexts. KUBECONFIG env var setup. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract machines/ibotta/modules/aws.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: awslog alias, ecrlogin function, saml2aws wrapper patterns. AWS/SAML2 authentication utilities. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Extract machines/ibotta/modules/oncall.zsh
description: Extract from work/.work_config: oncall-check, oncall-deploy, oncall-verify, oncall-fix, oncall-migrate, oncall-rollback functions. On-call runbook commands. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Move Ibotta static files
description: Move work/Brewfile -> machines/ibotta/Brewfile, work/gitconfig -> machines/ibotta/gitconfig, work/p10k.zsh -> machines/ibotta/p10k.zsh, work/prs-by-week.sh -> machines/ibotta/prs-by-week.sh, work/ping_services.py -> machines/ibotta/ping_services.py, work/linker_aliases -> machines/ibotta/linker_aliases, work/npm_list -> machines/ibotta/npm_list, work/asdfrc -> machines/ibotta/asdfrc.

title: Startup Message Go Rewrite
description: Phase 7: Rewrite get_startup_message.py as a Go binary for near-instant shell startup. Create tools/startup-message/ with main.go and go.mod. Add Makefile build target. Update machine init files to use the binary. Archive the Python version.

title: Write tools/startup-message/main.go
description: Go program (~60 lines) that: reads messages.txt from path passed as CLI argument, picks a random message (multi-line messages separated by blank lines), word-wraps to terminal width (COLUMNS env var or 80 fallback), prints centered colorized output. No machine detection needed — caller passes the right messages file.

title: Write tools/startup-message/go.mod
description: Initialize Go module for the startup-message tool. Minimal dependencies — stdlib only if possible (math/rand, os, fmt, strings, bufio).

title: Write Makefile with build target
description: Create a Makefile at repo root with a build target: 'make startup-message' runs 'go build -o bin/startup-message tools/startup-message/main.go'. May also add an 'all' target and a 'clean' target.

title: Build and verify startup-message binary
description: Run make startup-message, verify binary works: bin/startup-message machines/personal/messages.txt should print a random colorized quote. Compare latency to the Python version — should be <5ms vs ~30-50ms.

title: Update machine init files to use Go binary
description: Replace Python invocation in machines/personal/init.zsh and machines/ibotta/init.zsh with: DOTFILES/bin/startup-message DOTFILES/machines/<machine>/messages.txt. Ensure messages.txt exists for both machines (ibotta may share personal's or have its own).

title: Archive get_startup_message.py
description: Move personal/get_startup_message.py (and work copy if separate) to archive/ with date comment. The Python version is replaced by the Go binary but preserved for history.

title: Decompose Personal Config
description: Phase 4: Break personal/.personal_config and personal/.woog_config into machines/personal/ structure (init.zsh, path.zsh, aliases.zsh, modules/woog.zsh). Move Brewfile, gitconfig, messages.txt. Delete old personal/ directory.

title: Build machines/personal/init.zsh
description: Extract from personal/.personal_config: ASCII 'six' logo with random color, startup message invocation, sourcing of env vars. Uses DOTFILES_MACHINE instead of hostname check. Calls the startup-message binary (or Python script until Go rewrite is done).

title: Build machines/personal/path.zsh
description: Extract from personal/.personal_config: PYENV_ROOT and pyenv init, cargo/rust env sourcing, LaTeX path (/usr/local/texlive/2025/bin), rbenv init, Go paths (/usr/local/go/bin, ~/go/bin).

title: Build machines/personal/aliases.zsh
description: Extract from personal/.personal_config: cosy alias (code /Users/cole/repos/Cosy), prep alias (daily prep Go tool), cronsch() function.

title: Move woog config to machines/personal/modules/woog.zsh
description: Move personal/.woog_config content to machines/personal/modules/woog.zsh. Contains Django aliases (runserver, migrate, test, shell, refresh-reqs), woog-commands() help function, woogapi() and woogbot() navigation functions. Add # Commands: header block.

title: Move personal static files
description: Move personal/Brewfile -> machines/personal/Brewfile, personal/gitconfig -> machines/personal/gitconfig, personal/messages.txt -> machines/personal/messages.txt.

title: Delete old personal/ directory
description: After all content migrated, delete the old personal/ directory. Verify no remaining references in the sourcing chain.
